articles.author: Doc Louallen, Jack Moore
articles.title: Powerball jackpot climbs as no ticket matches all numbers
articles.description: No winner in the latest draw pushed the jackpot above one billion dollars.
articles.content: Lottery officials said the jackpot is now one of the largest in game history.

articles.author: Tim Vandenack
articles.title: Utah violinist detention by immigration officers draws backlash
articles.description: Supporters criticized federal action and called for his release.
articles.content: Community leaders said this is a misuse of immigration enforcement resources.

articles.author: Thomas Jones, David Eckert
articles.title: Texas football staff takeaways after loss to Ohio State
articles.description: Analysts reviewed red-zone execution and quarterback play after the defeat.
articles.content: The game featured late momentum swings and defensive breakdowns.

articles.author: Jacob Bogage, Emily Davies
articles.title: Court ruling threatens major tariff strategy at White House
articles.description: An appellate decision may weaken the administration's trade leverage.
articles.content: The administration has used tariff threats in global negotiations.

articles.author: Staff Reporter
articles.title: Nvidia and major cloud companies expand AI infrastructure spending
articles.description: Tech companies increased investment in chips, data centers and AI software.
articles.content: Nvidia, Microsoft and other tech leaders signaled higher AI capex for next quarter.

articles.author: Political Correspondent
articles.title: Election campaign enters final week as voter turnout debate grows
articles.description: Parties shifted strategy toward undecided voters and absentee ballots.
articles.content: Polling agencies reported movement among first-time voters before election day.

articles.author: Business Desk
articles.title: Semiconductor stocks rise as AI demand remains strong
articles.description: Chip makers gained after enterprise demand for accelerators beat forecasts.
articles.content: Analysts raised price targets for several technology companies.

articles.author: National Bureau
articles.title: Ballot counting rules updated ahead of major vote
articles.description: Officials said the updated process is intended to improve election transparency.
articles.content: The election commission published revised counting guidance for all districts.
